sections.title: Abstract
required_human_actions: rewrite abstract in human-authored prose
verify metric language against evaluation report
preserve local minimal implementation and no external certification limits
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect abstract and must be disclosed if retained.

sections.title: Introduction
required_human_actions: rewrite eScience motivation in human-authored prose
keep ASIEP positioned as evidence layer, not self-improvement algorithm
verify all related-work citation keys
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect positioning and related-work framing.

sections.title: Problem and Scope
required_human_actions: keep scope narrow and infrastructure-oriented
preserve no external API, no registry, and local-like package limits
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect scope boundaries.

sections.title: Requirements for Agent Self-Improvement Evidence
required_human_actions: convert checklist into concise requirements
avoid adding new requirements not implemented in M0-M10
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect requirement phrasing.

sections.title: ASIEP Profile and Lifecycle
required_human_actions: verify field names against schema
verify lifecycle statements against state machine docs
keep validator rule claims matched to implemented checks
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect technical description accuracy.

sections.title: Agent-native Toolchain
required_human_actions: verify each module path exists
do not expand into unimplemented runtime claims
keep list concise for page budget
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect module summary.

sections.title: Evidence Bundle and Local Packaging
required_human_actions: describe local digest verification without overstating security
state FDO and RO-Crate outputs are local-like
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect package boundary wording.

sections.title: Evaluation
required_human_actions: verify all metric values against report
state results as local fixture evaluation
avoid benchmark or open-world security claims
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect metric claims.

sections.title: Cross-standard Mapping
required_human_actions: verify every citation key
preserve explicit lossiness language
avoid external compliance or certification wording
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect standards mapping claims.

sections.title: Artifacts and Reproducibility
required_human_actions: decide repository link and anonymization language
do not claim archive DOI unless one exists
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect artifact availability wording.

sections.title: Limitations
required_human_actions: do not weaken limitations
preserve local fixture and no external certification limits
include privacy scanning is not DLP
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect limitation wording.

sections.title: Conclusion
required_human_actions: rewrite after page-budget trimming
avoid adding new claims not supported elsewhere
sections.ai_use_relevance: AI-generated draft text may affect final framing.

sections.title: Acknowledgements and AI-use disclosure draft
required_human_actions: adapt disclosure to final acknowledgements
identify AI system, affected sections, level of use, and author responsibility
do not list AI tools as authors
sections.ai_use_relevance: This section is directly relevant to IEEE AI-use disclosure.

global_gates.description: All AUTHOR_VERIFY markers are removed by human authors.
Local fixture, minimal implementation, and no external certification limits remain visible.
All evaluation numbers are checked against reports/asiep_v0.1_evaluation_report.json.
IEEE LaTeX compiles and page count is at most 8 pages excluding references.
